name_en: 【Factory Leather】🔥 As a brand classic, GG Supreme canvas has become the iconic fabric of the Gucci design world. This fabric frequently appears in new brand series and is reinterpreted through a Gucci aesthetic perspective. This mini handbag is fully decorated with the brand's classic interlocking pattern. Classic interlocking double G accessories add brand identity charm to this piece.
name_cn:
【Factory Leather】🔥 As a brand classic, GG Supreme canvas has become the iconic fabric of the Gucci design world. This fabric frequently appears in new brand series and is reinterpreted through a Gucci aesthetic perspective. This mini handbag is fully decorated with the brand's classic interlocking pattern. Classic interlocking double G accessories add brand identity charm to this piece.
Beige and Ebony GG Supreme canvas
Brown leather trim
Gold-tone hardware
Cotton-linen blend lining
As a Gucci Tag selected item, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovative experience.
Double G
Handle height: 10cm
Removable shoulder strap (49cm)
Zipper closure
Model: 772053
